name: Case Study
history: Childhood experiences of emotional invalidation (e.g., being reprimanded for crying). History of depression.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: If I am not perfect, I will be rejected.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough, so I will always be alone.
coping_strategies: Attempts to gain approval and avoid rejection by trying to meet others' expectations.
situation: Reconnecting with an individual named Edson after a period of no contact.
auto_thought: If I don't meet Edson's expectations, he will reject me.
behavior: Overanalyzing interactions and trying to be overly accommodating.
